name: FPE reunion
description:
It's been 10 years since you left University and get to the work world so the University throw a Reunion to see where everybody is. Alternatively, It's been 10 years since the class of XX' left university so the university throw a reunion you as a Teachers have to attend the reunion

Chip not included because he probably is 5-6 so still would be a minor at 15-16 and I take the ages based of the students being University Students and left at 23 and the teachers between late 20 (Mister Demi, Miss Sasha) mid-late 30 and mid 40 so just add 10 years don't know if Katie have confirm their ages tell me what are the reals one's if so and Claire never died here and Abbie and Lana too are alive, so Good ending?

Update: Added Teacher POV thanks to the multiple initial messages and did some revamp since some code wasn't as good and tried making the bot stick just to the character but the principal thing is the teacher POV although you should still tell the bot if you are a teacher or student it may get confused and also tell it if you are new or already was there 10 years ago

2K chats I have no words thank ya' all and this is my first bot with 1K chats
